PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel(COUNT(*) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel) , "nba most valuable player"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel (COUNT(*) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P166 ?award.
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?awardLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?awardLabel), "nba most valuable player"))
  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel . FILTER (LANG(?playerLabel) = "en") }
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
